utility_evaluation.REASONING: The format requires 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation (with flight details and costs), accommodation (with hotel selection and costs), activities (with costs), additional_services (with costs), and total_budget (with full cost breakdown). The final package includes all of these: destination is specified (Lisbon, Portugal); travel_dates are given (2024-07-01 to 2024-07-05); transportation includes detailed flight info with costs; accommodation includes detailed hotel info and cost; activities include one clearly described activity with cost; additional_services include restaurant recommendation with cost; and total_budget includes full cost breakdown with remaining budget. All items are fully specified with the required details.
